6.anchor: If you point these things out to the brothers and sisters,
6.note: The Greek word for brothers and sisters

12.anchor: I do not permit a woman to teach or to assume authority over a man;

18.anchor: For Scripture says, “Do not muzzle an ox while it is treading out the grain,”

2.anchor: Those who have believing masters should not show them disrespect just because they are fellow believers. Instead, they should serve them even better because their masters are dear to them as fellow believers and are devoted to the welfare
2.note: Or and benefit from the service

4.anchor: He must manage his own family well and see that his children obey him, and he must do so in a manner worthy of full

11.anchor: In the same way, the women
11.note: Possibly deacons’ wives or women who are deacons
